payload.answer: The input is an expository/article-style source consisting of the entire provided passage. It presents general claims about AI memory systems, atomic memory cards, semantic indexes, and application database lifecycle/conflict ownership.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence. Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable. A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.
